title: Alli Arjuna Lyrics Kaaviya Thalaivan Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song:  Alli Arjuna
Singer: Haricharan, Bela Shende
Lyrics: Vaali 
Movie: Kaaviya Thalaivan
Music: AR Rahman  

Vandhanam vandhanam 
vandhanam vandhanam
yellorukkum
thandhanam thandhanam

Kundhanam kundhanam
kundhanam kundhanam
idam pidikka
mundhanum mundhanum

Yaadhavanaam andha madhavanum
avan machunanaam andha arjunanum
yaathirai varugayile
theerththa yaathirai varugaiyile
naadu kadandhu kaadu kadandhu
madhuraikku vaaaraaga

Then madhuraikku vaaraanga
angu nadappadhu alli raajiyam
aththanai aangalum sutha poojiyam

alliyo pudhu rosa
paarthaar arjuna maharaasaa
alli malarula kallu viludhu
arjunan mugathula jollu valiyudhu
aarambam aagudhu naadaga kadhalu
aanukkum pennum nadakkura modhalu

Alli varugiraal alli varugiraal
azhagi aval perazhagi
Alli varugiraal alli varugiraal
azhagi aval perazhagi

Mugathazhagi aamaa mugathazhagi
maruthaani poosiya negathazhagi
kovil thoon pola thodaiyazhagi
komberi moookkan pola sadaiyazhagi

Ava nadakkura nadaya paarthu
thendral kaaththu
adha paaththu
udal verthhu udal thorthu
alli varugiraalae.

Alli varugiraal alli varugiraal
azhagi aval perazhagi

Priysagiye piriyasagiye
mazhai naalaa idhu mazhai naalaa
mayilinam thogai virippadhenna
adhu mohana naadagam nadippadhenna
mohana naadagam nadippadhenna

Nalla sagunaa 
idhu nalla sagunaa.
oru naayagam vara koodum
unga vaai velukka
iru vizhi sivakka
kaadhal noi thannai tharakkoodum.

Yaaradi avan yaaradi
veeraadhi veeraneo kooradi
sooraadhi soorano kooradi
indha alliyayai jaadhi malliyai
inba valliyayai, uyir kolliyayai
vellathaan vandhavanaa
ezhu vanna migundhavanaa
yaaradi avan yaaradi .

Abaiyilirukkum aththanai perukkum
vanakkam vanakkam 
en vanakkathile en thamizh manakkum.

panja paandavar anju pergalae
naduvile naan pirandhaen
arjunan enbadhu en peyaru
aththinapuri thaan en ooru. 

Kannaa kannaa
yaen azhaithaai 
ennai yaen azhaithai
arjunanae en aaruyir thozha..

Madhuraiyayai aalgira alli
en manadhai eduthaale kalli
en ullathathai ottiya palli
avala odukkanum padukkayil pulli.

Indha samyathil ne udhavanum kannaa
engala serthu nee vaikanum onnaa
Naan Bamaavukkuthaanda Maama
Adha Nee Marakathey Aamaa
Unnai Vittal Ennakku Yaaru
Udhavi Seivaar Kooru

Naan Maargangal Solven Kelu
Mana Maalaiyai Thaangum Un Tholu

Naan Annathooviyil Alandhirukka
En Manikazhuthil
Thaali Kattalamaa Kattalamaa

En Mela Kuththam Illa
Unna Kanda Muthala
En Nenju Suthamilla
En Mela Kutham Illa
Unna Kanda Muthala
En Nenju Suthamilla

Nee Potathu Ethanai Vedamadaa
Kundhi Puthiranaai Vandhu Moodumada
Veeran Endraal Nee Villedu
Indha Poovaiyin Maele Nee Poarthodu

Nenju Porukkuthillaiye
Nenju Porukkuthillaiye
Naam Thaayaal Pirandhoam
Thamizhaal Valarndhoam

Thayum Tamizhum Pendhane
Irandum Irandu Kandhaane
Thayum Tamizhum Pendhane
Irandum Irandu Kandhaane

Parangiyarku
Bharatha Thaaithaan Adimaiyaadha?
Aval Kaivilangalum
Kaal Vilangaalum Naalum Novadha?

Viduthalai Velviyil Koduthalai
Vellaiyum Seivano Suduthalai
Makkalukku Illai Soodu
Ithu Maaperum MaanakKedu
Enge Pogum Naadu
Ithu Yaam Irukkum Thaai Veedu
Nenju Porukkuthillaiye
Nenju Porukkuthillaiye

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

Who composed the music for Alli Arjuna?

The music was composed by the legendary AR Rahman.

Which movie features the song Alli Arjuna?

The song is featured in the Tamil movie Kaaviya Thalaivan.

Who are the singers of Alli Arjuna?

The song is sung by Bela Shende and Haricharan.

What is the theme of the song Alli Arjuna?

The song is a classical melody that reflects cultural and emotional depth.

When was the movie Kaaviya Thalaivan released?

The movie was released in the year 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Alli Arjuna from the 2014 Tamil movie Kaaviya Thalaivan, starring Siddharth and Vedhika, is a classical duet sung by Bela Shende and Haricharan. Composed by the legendary AR Rahman with lyrics by Vaali, the song is a melodious and culturally rich piece that reflects the artistic essence of the film. It portrays a significant moment in the movie, blending traditional music with profound emotions. This song is a testament to the timeless beauty of classical Tamil music and cinema.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Alli Arjuna from the movie Kaaviya Thalaivan is a captivating classical melody that showcases the brilliance of AR Rahman's composition and Vaali's poetic lyrics. Sung beautifully by Bela Shende and Haricharan, this song transports listeners to a realm of cultural richness and emotional depth. Experience the timeless charm of this musical masterpiece that resonates with the essence of Tamil cinema.
stanzaMeanings: Greetings, greetings, greetings to everyone. This place is a gift. As we move forward, we will cross the land and the forest to reach Madurai. There, everything is beautiful, and Arjuna is like a flower. His face shines with joy, and love begins to blossom. She walks gracefully, and the breeze carries her beauty. This is the beginning of a beautiful journey.
I will speak of paths; listen to the garland that supports your shoulders.
In the land of the rich, can I tie the sacred thread on my wrist?
There is no fault in me; my heart is pure when I see you for the first time.
You have come to this world as a brave warrior. If you leave, this flower will wither away.
My heart cannot bear this; we were born as Tamils.
Mother and Tamil, both are precious; they are like two eyes.
Is it not a shame for the Bharatians to be enslaved? Will they not suffer in their homes and lives?
In the fight for freedom, will the white ones also suffer? This land is where we will live, but my heart cannot bear this.
